title: time control mod
body:
# what does the mod add?

this mod adds some very cool time control tools, such as a **time control wand** that slows time down, a **time control wand** that speeds time up, a **time controller** that does nothing, but is required to craft the wands, and a **old drawing**, which is just a drawing of the time controller, the items are currently not obtainable in survival, but in the future, I may add things like an end structure to get the time controller, and a house to get the drawing.



# help! I'm stuck at the time being frozen

left click with the item you used to go time back to normal,
if that doesn't work, then rejoin.


# Why would I use the mod?

the mod may be useful for building in creative, like if you want to keep some mobs at a specific space, just freeze time, and you can build without mobs blocking your way! it's basically just a faster method of typing /tick.

or just to play around with the mod
